instruction:
Calculate the integral:
$$
\int_{-\sqrt{5}}^{\sqrt{5}} \frac{ 4 \cdot x^7+6 \cdot x^6-12 \cdot x^5-14 \cdot x^3-24 \cdot x^2+2 \cdot x+4 }{ x^2+2 } \, dx
$$

Options:
A. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(sqrt(5)/sqrt(10))
B. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(sqrt(5)/sqrt(7))
C. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(2*sqrt(5)/sqrt(2))
D. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(sqrt(5)/2)
E. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(sqrt(5)/sqrt(4))
F. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(sqrt(5)/sqrt(6))
G. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(sqrt(5)/sqrt(8))
H. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(sqrt(5)/sqrt(3))
I. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(sqrt(5)/sqrt(2))
J. 20*sqrt(5) + 4*sqrt(2)*arctan(sqrt(5)/sqrt(9))
